prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "1A. Risk Factors" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments".
Find where Item 1A ends: right before the "Item 1B" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 1A that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Our stock price may be volatile.
Our stock price has fluctuated in the past and may experience declines in the future as a result of the volatile nature of the stock market,
developments in our business and/or factors outside of our control including certain of the risk factors discussed in this report. Many factors may
cause the market price for our common stock to change including: (i) our operating results as compared to investors' expectations in any given
period; (ii) our revenue growth and future growth prospects; (iii) our operating changes and general industry conditions or economic trends (iii) changes
